info.description: A comprehensive development toolkit for Odoo environments with profiling, monitoring, and optimization features.
info.title: OdooDevTools API

post.description:
Agent endpoint: receive an aggregated batch of ORM stats and critical events.
The batch is pushed onto a Redis stream for asynchronous processing by the ingest worker.
Supports gzip-compressed bodies (Content-Encoding: gzip). Max body size: 5 MB.
Agent endpoint: receive a batch of Odoo error/exception events
Agent endpoint: persist a collected Odoo schema snapshot

get.description: Upgrades the HTTP connection to a WebSocket connection and handles agent heartbeats.

400.description: Bad Request: Missing or invalid agent_id

401.description: Unauthorized: Invalid or missing API key

403.description: Forbidden: Agent does not belong to the tenant

404.description: Not Found: Environment not found for the given agent_id

500.description: Internal Server Error: Failed to upgrade connection or database error

post.description: Lets a logged-in user change their own password. Requires the current password for verification. All sessions are revoked on success.
Always returns HTTP 200 regardless of whether the email is registered (prevents user enumeration). Sends a reset link via MailHog when the account exists.
Authenticates a user by email and password. Enforces brute-force protection via Redis. Returns an access and refresh token pair.
Invalidates the current session or all sessions when logout_all=true. Requires a valid Bearer token.

get.description: Returns the profile of the authenticated user.

patch.description: Updates full_name and/or email for the authenticated user. If the email is changed a new verification email is sent via MailHog.

post.description: Rotates the refresh token (old one is blacklisted in Redis) and issues a new access + refresh pair.
Creates a new tenant and owner user, and returns an access and refresh token.
Sends a fresh verification email via MailHog. Returns 409 if the email is already verified.
Consumes the one-time Redis token and updates the user's password. All existing sessions are revoked on success.

get.description: Returns all active sessions for the authenticated user. Redis is checked first; the DB is used as a fallback.

delete.description: Invalidates a specific session by ID. The session must belong to the authenticated user.

post.description: Validates the 6-digit verification code and marks the user's email as verified.

get.description: Get all environments for the current tenant

post.description: Register a new Odoo environment under the current tenant

get.description: Get details of a specific environment

delete.description: Permanently delete an environment and its associated data

post.description: Run the 5-stage ACL pipeline: "why can't user X see record Y?"
Generate a one-time token that an agent uses to self-register and obtain API credentials

get.description: Return all API keys for the given environment. Raw key values are never included.

post.description: Generate a new agent API key for the given environment. The raw key is returned once and never shown again. If expires_at is omitted the key expires in 90 days. If scopes is omitted it defaults to ["agent:write"].

delete.description: Mark an API key as inactive. The agent using it will receive 401 on the next request.

get.description: List performance budgets for an environment

post.description: Create a new performance budget for an environment

get.description: Retrieve a budget with latest sample and 7-day trend

delete.description: Delete a performance budget and its samples

patch.description: Update a budget's threshold percentage and active status

get.description: List performance overhead samples for a budget
Get per-function performance breakdown for a specific budget sample
Get the 7-day average, max, and sample count for a budget
Returns aggregated error groups for the given environment, sorted by occurrence count

parameters.description: Filter by status: open, acknowledged, resolved
parameters.name: status

get.description: Returns a single error group with optional raw traceback from S3

parameters.description: Include raw traceback from S3 (default false)
parameters.name: trace

put.description: Update feature flags for an environment and push to connected agent

get.description: Analyze ORM stats and profiler recordings to detect, score, and suggest fixes for N+1 query patterns

parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to limit analysis window (default: last 24h)
parameters.name: since

get.description: Returns per-period N+1 detection counts and durations for trend visualization
List profiler recordings for an environment (lightweight, no waterfall)
List profiler recordings that exceed the given ms threshold
Retrieve a profiler recording with a fully-built waterfall timeline
Return schema snapshot summaries for the given environment, newest first
Return the most recently captured schema snapshot for the given environment
Filter models in the latest snapshot by technical name or display label

detail.description:
Detail provides the concrete Odoo action (e.g. which menu to open,
which XML ID to add, which field to change).

severity.description:
Severity indicates how disruptive the fix is:
  "low"    = safe, targeted change
  "medium" = broader impact, review recommended
  "high"   = affects many users, proceed with caution

stage.description: Stage is the pipeline stage that triggered this suggestion.

summary.description: Summary is a short, human-readable description of the fix.

group_data.description: GroupData is all res.groups records from the agent. Each must have: id, name, implied_ids.

model.description: Model is the Odoo model technical name (e.g. "sale.order").

operation.description: Operation is the CRUD operation to check: read, write, create, unlink.

record_data.description:
RecordData is the optional field values of the target record (for domain eval).
Required when record_id > 0. Keys are field names, values are JSON-decoded Odoo values.

record_id.description:
RecordID is the optional database ID of a specific record to evaluate
domain conditions against. If 0, domain evaluation is skipped.

user_data.description:
UserData is the raw res.users record as fetched from Odoo by the agent.
Must contain at least: id, login, name, active, groups_id, company_id.

user_id.description: UserID is the Odoo uid to trace (e.g. 2 for admin).

raw_key.description: shown once; not stored in plaintext

sample_sql.example: SELECT id, name FROM res_partner WHERE active = true

edges.description: Edges are the dependency links between nodes.

nodes.description: Nodes are the individual computed field evaluations.

bottleneck_count.description: BottleneckCount is the number of nodes flagged as bottlenecks.

max_depth.description: MaxDepth is the deepest dependency chain depth.

node_count.description: NodeCount is the number of computed field evaluations.

slowest_ms.description: SlowestMS is the duration of the slowest compute node.

slowest_node.description: SlowestNode is the ID of the slowest compute node.

total_ms.description: TotalMS is the total time spent in compute field evaluations.

trigger_field.description: TriggerField is the root field write that started the chain.

from.description: From is the source node ID (the field that was written/changed).

to.description: To is the target node ID (the computed field that was triggered).

trigger_field.description: TriggerField is the specific field that triggered the recomputation.

depends_on.description: DependsOn lists the field names this computation depends on.

depth.description: Depth is the nesting level in the dependency chain (0 = root trigger).

duration_ms.description: DurationMS is how long this computation took.

id.description: ID is a unique identifier for this node within the chain.

is_bottleneck.description: IsBottleneck flags nodes that are disproportionately slow.

module.description: Module is the Odoo module that defines this compute (e.g. "sale").

parent_id.description: ParentID links to the node that triggered this computation.

sql_count.description: SQLCount is the number of SQL queries executed during this computation.

expires_at.description: RFC3339; defaults to 90 days from now if omitted

session_id.description: specific session; empty = current token only

avg_calls_per_window.description: AvgCallsPerWindow is the average call count per detection window.

first_seen.description: FirstSeen is the earliest detection window.

impact_score.description:
ImpactScore ranks the pattern: higher = more damaging. Computed as
total_ms × occurrences / 1000 (normalized to seconds of wasted time).

last_seen.description: LastSeen is the most recent detection window.

occurrences.description: Occurrences is how many time windows this pattern was detected in.

peak_calls.description: PeakCalls is the highest call count seen in a single window.

peak_ms.description: PeakMS is the highest duration seen in a single window.

sample_sql.description: SampleSQL is a concrete SQL example from the pattern.

signature.description: Signature is the normalized SQL signature (literals replaced with ?).

suggestion.description: Suggestion is an actionable fix recommendation.

total_calls.description: TotalCalls is the cumulative call count across all detected windows.

total_ms.description: TotalMS is the cumulative duration in milliseconds.

top_method.description: TopMethod is the method with the most N+1 impact.

top_model.description: TopModel is the model with the most N+1 impact.

total_patterns.description: TotalPatterns is the number of distinct model:method patterns.

total_wasted_ms.description: TotalWastedMS is the cumulative time spent in N+1 queries.

depth.description: Depth is the nesting level (0 = top-level).

duration_ms.description: DurationMS is the span duration in milliseconds.

id.description: ID is a unique identifier for this span within the waterfall.

is_error.description: IsError flags spans that resulted in an error.

is_n1.description: IsN1 flags spans that are part of an N+1 pattern.

method.description: Method is the ORM method name (optional).

model.description: Model is the Odoo model involved (optional).

module.description: Module is the Odoo module that originated this span (optional).

parent_id.description: ParentID links child spans to their parent (e.g. ORM → SQL).

sql.description: SQL is the query text for SQL spans (optional, truncated).

start_ms.description: StartMS is the offset from the recording start in milliseconds.

ApiKeyAuth.description: Type "ApiKey" followed by a space and your API key (e.g. "ApiKey odt_xxx...").
ApiKeyAuth.name: Authorization

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
